nodes.label: Tech Stack (Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript 5, Tailwind v4, ESLint 9)
nodes.norm_label: tech stack (next.js 16, react 19, typescript 5, tailwind v4, eslint 9)

nodes.label: Spec Driven Design Workflow
nodes.rationale: Use /spec before starting any large feature. Do not write production code until the spec is marked Approved and /spec-impl is invoked.

nodes.label: Server Components Default Pattern
nodes.rationale: Server Components are the default; add "use client" only when a component uses state, effects, refs, browser APIs, or event handlers.

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS v4 Theme Configuration
nodes.rationale: Configured through CSS (@import "tailwindcss" and @theme inline in app/globals.css) rather than a tailwind.config.js file.

nodes.label: Home Page 7 Sections (Hero, Why, Games Preview, Stats, Activity, Pricing, Final CTA)
nodes.norm_label: home page 7 sections (hero, why, games preview, stats, activity, pricing, final cta)

nodes.label: Home as Client Component Decision
nodes.rationale: Needs useState, useEffect, useRef, useRouter, IntersectionObserver, and mouse events (tilt hover). Server Component does not allow hooks or browser APIs.

nodes.norm_label: home route and library route split

nodes.label: Server Action Email Sending Decision
nodes.rationale: Server Action is simpler for a form; the secret never touches the client. Chosen over Route Handler API.

nodes.label: Zod Dual Validation Decision
nodes.rationale: Zod in Server Action + basic HTML5 validation on client. Dual validation gives better UX and security.
